title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Saturn, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Killer, Lilith, Unknown person #12 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Remember, this place isn't government affiliated...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You have no legal rights here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whitebeard must have kept all his treasure here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Xya!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't tell us, we'll consider it an act of defiance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could shoot you all one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If you think that'll make you more talkative?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WAAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: T-There's no treasure here! Stop pointing that gun at my little brother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really won't treat us as fellow humans just because we can't pay the government?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You monsters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...to act tough when Marco's not around?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hold her still!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Gyaah! Stop it! Please stop this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GRANN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know, I know,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: STEADY...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please stop this! She's just an old lady!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GRANNY!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UAAAH!! HANDS OFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BLEGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stay away from Pappy's home!!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Captain Ratel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Syaya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I-I-It's Edward....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wee-!!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Weevill

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Warships were meant to hunt down the warlords now they're disbanded!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've lost all contact with the other squad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...he got them all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What strength, he's a bonafide monster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get back to the ship! We need to wait for backup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is SpHinx!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: An ex-warlord just showed up! It's weevil!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Requesting immediate assistance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: If that big guy hadn't shown up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The village would be toast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a hero... I'm glad you're all safe-yoi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That wasn't the end of it, Marco!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who do you think they sent in after that call for backup?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
